original_file: Magic domains, deploy-less horizontal scaling, new docs
email_subject: Magic domains, deploy-less horizontal scaling, new docs
email_body:
Railway Logo



***************

Changelog Time!

***************



It's Friday and you know what that means! Here's a summary of the stuff we shipped this week:



* One-click DNS setup on Cloudflare

* Deploy-less horizontal scaling

* TXT verification for trusted domains

* New Railway documentation

* Fixes and improvements



Read the changelog ( https://railway.com/changelog/2025-02-06-magic-domains?utm_campaign=Changelog&utm_content=Changelog+Template&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )



If you have any thoughts/feedback on the changes we're making, reach out on Central Station ( https://station.railway.com/new?type=feedback&utm_campaign=Changelog&utm_content=Changelog+Template&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )!



Regards,



Your friends at Railway



Unsubscribe from marketing emails ( https://railway.com/preferences?token=75d83244-3087-49e8-a95b-a488740b3b4d&utm_campaign=Changelog&utm_content=Changelog+Template&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
